approver: Leeuhyuk delegated approval via Codex thread
source: Codex thread user messages on 2026-07-08: 모두 승인할께, 나대신 모두 승인해, 묻지 말고 진행
notes: This file records user-delegated conditional exception approval. It does not mark missing staging, production, UAT, backup, migration, or first-week operation evidence as complete. Full go-live still requires the evidence documents and production checks listed in the release gates.

exceptions.userImpact: Remote DB and browser persistence evidence is still required before claiming full operational readiness; until then the system may proceed only as a conditional release candidate or controlled pilot.
exceptions.mitigation: Keep backend transaction, audit, file, permission, and UI regression gates active; run DB-backed integration and remote UI persistence evidence before unrestricted production use.

exceptions.userImpact: Operating controls for environment separation, backup, recovery, data migration, and role UAT are approved only as exceptions until real evidence is attached.
exceptions.mitigation: Production release gate must still require completed inventory, backup restore, data migration, role UAT, and go-live handoff evidence with owner, timestamp, and evidence link.

exceptions.userImpact: Deployment platform, production domain, DB, object storage, secret manager, and monitoring decisions remain conditional until actual environment inventory is completed.
exceptions.mitigation: Use production environment inventory and release manifest checks to block promotion if production URLs, secrets, storage, rollback, or monitoring evidence is missing.

exceptions.userImpact: Staging smoke, production infrastructure, cutover, pilot UAT, production smoke, and final acceptance evidence are not complete yet; business use should remain controlled until those records pass strict gates.
exceptions.mitigation: Require staging smoke evidence, production go-live evidence, final acceptance evidence, release notes, rollback plan, and owner sign-off before full live operation.

exceptions.userImpact: First-week production monitoring, first disbursement reconciliation, PITR proof, and support SLA evidence can only be completed after go-live.
exceptions.mitigation: Keep post-go-live stabilization evidence as a stable-operation gate and do not claim stable operation before daily checks and first-week sign-off are complete.
